title: Fragments On Nature And Life - The Heavens
content:
Wisp and meteor nightly falling,
    But the Stars of God remain.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Fragments On Nature And Life - The Heavens"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
